name: Claude D3.js Skill
description: A comprehensive Claude skill for D3.js data visualization. 21k+ word SKILL.md covering patterns, examples, best practices for building interactive data visualizations with D3.js. Exceptional educational resource for developers integrating Claude with D3.js projects.
review: Exceptional educational resource for D3.js visualization. 21k+ comprehensive SKILL.md with patterns, examples, best practices. Approved despite 5-month maintenance gap — content remains stable and the documentation quality is outstanding.

drax_results.notes: 21k+ comprehensive SKILL.md with D3.js patterns, examples, and best practices.
